features: Preserved v3.0.65 Global Action Lock + Workflow QA behavior
Added workflow state normalization after data loads so records that leave a stage do not remain selected in the old queue
Added pending dispatch selection pruning so assigned requests move out of Pending Dispatch cleanly
Added Report Builder safety routing so already-published reports open in Report Archive instead of staying publishable
Added visual-only button cleanup so placeholder icon buttons are disabled and no longer appear as active broken controls
Added form submit busy-state protection to reduce duplicate saves and double submissions
Removed duplicate Guard Approval search handler
Removed unreachable dead code from approval notes action
Kept no URL fields for photos/videos and preserved device-upload-only media workflow
